---
title: "Margaret Elizabeth G. Buston"
---

## Margaret Elizabeth G. Buston

**Dates:** (1869-1939)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. Roger Buston, Vicar of Twyford

### Biography

She married (1912) James Clayton.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 11th [1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
